title: Disorderly Conduct
writer: William Anthony McGuire, Winfield R. Sheehan
actors: Spencer Tracy, Sally Eilers, El Brendel
plot: When motorcycle cop Dick Fay gives a ticket to Phyllis Crawford, her father's graft-fed influence leads to his demotion to foot patrolman. When Fay leads a raid on a gangster's place he discovers Phyllis there, helps her escape, t...
